display_text: Primal Beast Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances Uproar to release multiple projectile waves that Break enemies upon hit. This upgrade counters evasion and passive-dependent heroes by applying Break, making it particularly effective against heroes reliant on abilities like Blur or Evasion.
search_text: Primal Beast Aghanim Scepter Break evasion passive-dependent anti-evasion anti-passive

display_text: Primal Beast Aghanim's Shard: Grants the ability to throw a rock that stuns and damages enemies, increasing Uproar stacks. This upgrade transforms Primal Beast into a more versatile initiator and teamfighter, countering heroes that cluster together by forcing them to scatter or suffer follow-up damage.
search_text: Primal Beast Aghanim Shard initiation teamfight stun scatter cluster counter
